reviewSummary.summary: The draft artifact contains mostly unrelated home-page and decorative elements while missing the core login workflow controls and validation elements required for downstream automation. Several approved elements use weak naming and brittle or overly generic locators.

issues.message: The login username input field required for authentication workflows is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a semantically named username input element using a stable locator such as the User Name placeholder or dedicated input identifier.

issues.message: The password input field required for authentication and password masking validation is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a password field element using a stable identifier such as id=password.

issues.message: The primary login submission control is missing from the approved page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a Login button element with a stable semantic locator tied to the Login control.

issues.message: The generic Failed authentication message expected by all negative authentication scenarios is missing.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a semantic authentication failure message element using a reusable text or alert locator for the generic Failed message.

issues.message: The artifact does not provide observable negative-outcome validation support for failed authentication scenarios beyond remaining on the page.
issues.suggested_fix: Include the generic Failed authentication message element as a first-class validation element for negative login coverage.

issues.message: The person/profile button belongs to the upstream shared home_page workflow context and should not be owned by login_page.
issues.suggested_fix: Move ownership of the person/profile button to the home_page resource and reference it through upstream navigation reuse guidance.

issues.message: The notification button is unrelated to the documented login workflow and adds unnecessary page noise.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the notification button from the approved login page model unless a downstream workflow explicitly depends on it.

issues.message: The customer signup button is unrelated to login authentication coverage and appears to belong to another business workflow.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove unrelated survey and signup controls from the login page artifact.

issues.message: The clean survey button is unrelated to the login workflow.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove this control from the login page artifact.

issues.message: The site survey button is unrelated to the login workflow.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove this control from the login page artifact.

issues.message: The locator xpath=//a is dangerously generic and likely to match multiple links across the application.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the duplicate wrapper link element and keep the stable home button locator id=auto_home_btn.

issues.message: This generic anchor element duplicates the Home button behavior already represented by auto_home_btn_button.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the duplicate anchor wrapper element from the approved model.

issues.message: The background content container is a decorative layout wrapper and not meaningful for workflow automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background container from the approved elements.

issues.message: The approved element naming relies on implementation IDs instead of business semantics.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to Back Button for downstream readability and maintainability.

issues.message: The approved element naming is implementation-centric rather than workflow-centric.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to Home Button using business-readable naming.

approved_elements.name: Username Field
approved_elements.description: Primary username input for customer authentication.

approved_elements.name: Password Field
approved_elements.description: Password entry field with masked input behavior.

approved_elements.name: Back Button
approved_elements.description: Returns the user to home_page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: Home Button
approved_elements.description: Navigates the user back to home_page in unauthenticated state.

approved_elements.name: Authentication Failed Message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message displayed for rejected login attempts.
